problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantee statements reference port names as both left and right sides of equality, which is invalid syntax
problems.minimal_edit: Replace each port name with a fresh variable declaration and use that variable in the guarantee

executor_steps: Declare new variables gyro_out_data_x_var, gyro_out_data_y_var, gyro_out_data_z_var in the AGREE annex
Rewrite each guarantee to reference the new variable instead of the port name
Ensure the variable declarations are placed before the guarantee statements
